creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
This is still a problem with openoffice.org-3-devel (currently 
3.2.20090820).  With devel/cppunit installed, it fails as follows. 
Without cppunit, it builds fine.

...
deliver -- version: 271271
Module 'i18npool' delivered successfully. 31 files copied, 5 files 
unchanged

1 module(s):
         cppunit
need(s) to be rebuilt

Reason(s):

ERROR: error 65280 occurred while making 
/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3-devel/work/DEV300_m55/cppunit

Attention: if you build and deliver the above module(s) you may 
prolongue your the build issuing command "build --from cppunit"

rmdir /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3-devel/work/DEV300_m55/7558
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3-devel.


-Warren Block * Rapid City, South Dakota USA
